  # Primitive.svg
  
  **Brand-consistent SVG icon sets generated by AI.**

  [![Use Primitive.svg](https://img.shields.io/badge/Launch_App-FF3E00?style=for-the-badge&logo=vercel&logoColor=white)](https://chidirnweke.github.io/primitive.svg/)
  [![Built with Svelte](https://img.shields.io/badge/SvelteKit-0F0F0F?style=for-the-badge&logo=svelte&logoColor=white)](#)
  [![Local First](https://img.shields.io/badge/Privacy-Local_First-38B2AC?style=for-the-badge)](#)

  ---
</div>

Primitive.svg is a developer tool designed to bridge the gap between natural language and precise vector graphics. Stop hunting for matching icons across disparate libraries. Describe your project and aesthetic, and generate a cohesive, production-ready vector library in seconds using your preferred LLM via OpenRouter.

<br/>

<br/>

## ⌗ Why use Primitive.svg?

- **Bring Your Own Key (BYOK):** 100% free UI. Just provide your OpenRouter API key to power the generation process.
- **Zero-Backend Privacy:** Everything happens on your device. Prompts, keys, and your generated assets are stored locally in your browser's IndexedDB. No tracking, no external database.
- **No Signup Walls:** Start generating immediately. You don't need to create an account or sit on a waitlist.
- **Strict Visual Control:** Define strict constraints like base stroke width and color palettes, ensuring the generated assets match your brand perfectly.

## ⌗ The Workflow

1. **Initialize Spec:** Name your project and provide high-level style directives (e.g., "Organic, leafy shapes, soft minimal lines").
2. **Set Rules:** Choose your preferred AI model (Claude 3.5 Sonnet recommended) and establish strict constraints (stroke width, palette).
3. **Refine & Iterate:** Generate your SVGs, edit the raw code if needed, and tweak style controls until they are perfect.
4. **Export:** Download your assets as raw SVGs, optimized React components, or Svelte components directly into your codebase.

## ⌗ Development Setup

To run Primitive.svg locally:

Ensure you have Node.js and `pnpm` installed.

```sh
# 1. Clone & install dependencies
pnpm install

# 2. Start the development server
pnpm dev
```

The app will be available at `http://localhost:5173`. 

### Building for Production

To create an optimized production version of the app:

```sh
pnpm build
pnpm preview
```

## ⌗ Built With

- **Framework**: [SvelteKit](https://kit.svelte.dev/)
- **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS](https://tailwindcss.com/)
- **State/Storage**: IndexedDB (Local-first)
- **AI Integration**: [OpenRouter API](https://openrouter.ai/)
